document_api_meta.title: Get Live Core Stats
document_api_meta.env_desc: This API returns the core stats of live detail, e.g. GMV.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^stats
response_param.desc: The stats of the live room

response_param.name: ^^sales
response_param.desc: The number of product units sold from the livestream

response_param.name: ^^local_gmv
response_param.desc: Revenue

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: The amount of GMV

response_param.name: ^^^currency
response_param.desc: Currency Code

response_param.name: ^^created_order_count
response_param.desc: The number of SKU orders created by users from the livestream

response_param.name: ^^current_visitor_count
response_param.desc: Viewers

response_param.name: ^^paid_order_count
response_param.desc: The number of SKU orders created and paid by users from the livestream

response_param.name: ^^local_unit_price
response_param.desc: The average price of the units sold

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: The amount of unit price

response_param.name: ^^^currency
response_param.desc: Currency Code

response_param.name: ^^product_reach_count
response_param.desc: The number of product clicks from the livestream, including product list and product card clicks

response_param.name: ^^watch_pv
response_param.desc: The number of views of the livestream

response_param.name: ^^click_through_rate
response_param.desc: Click through rate，product clicks / views

response_param.name: ^^accumulated_new_follower_count
response_param.desc: The number of times users clicked to follow the creator

response_param.name: ^^buyer_count
response_param.desc: The number of unique users who paid for orders made from livestream, including returned/refunded orders

response_param.name: ^^accumulated_comment_count
response_param.desc: The cumulative number of times users left comments on the livestream

response_param.name: ^^product_view_count
response_param.desc: The number of impressions of all livestream products, including product list and product card impressions

response_param.name: ^^click_order_rate
response_param.desc: Click to order，paid sku orders/ product clicks

response_param.name: ^^avg_watching_duration
response_param.desc: The average length of time each unique viewer watches the livestream.

response_param.name: ^^accumulated_sharing_count
response_param.desc: The cumulative number of times users shared the livestream

response_param.name: ^^peak_concurrent_user_count
response_param.desc: The peak number of concurrent viewers of the livestream

error_code_list.msg: Invalid param. Please check room id.

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java
